About Organization

Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalaya is a renowned organization in India. The organization is committed to providing quality education to girls from disadvantaged backgrounds.
The organization has been working tirelessly to improve the lives of girls and women in India.

The Kasturba Gandhi Balika Vidyalaya Hamirpur Recruitment 2026 is a great opportunity for females to work with a renowned organization. The programme aims to provide employment opportunities to females in various roles.
The programme is open to females only and the last date to apply is 25 July 2026.
